questions: small business er jonno branding tips
answers: Branding is the process of creating a unique identity for a business — including name, logo, colors, voice, and values. It's how people recognize and feel about your company.
Branding holo tomar business er identity toiri kora. Logo, color, tone of voice, values — shob miliye brand hoy. Strong brand mane customer trust beshi.
To build a brand, define your mission, know your audience, create a visual identity (logo, colors, fonts), develop a consistent voice, and deliver on your promises consistently.
Branding goes beyond just a logo — it's the entire experience people have with your business. Good branding builds trust, creates loyalty, and sets you apart from competitors.
